Excellent service.

reviews.comment:
Solo dos empleados, pobres haciendo malabares para atender, 3 islas, solo una habilitada,  hora pico 7:30 am y una cola de autos de locos ! Única YPF en muchos kilómetros y el servicio es un desastre.
Que pena que un lugar tan turístico y de paso de tanta gente no tenga una FULL y un servicio decente

(Translated by Google)
Only two employees, poor souls juggling to serve customers, three pumps, only one open, rush hour 7:30 am and a crazy line of cars! The only YPF for miles around and the service is a disaster. It's a shame that such a touristy place, a thoroughfare for so many people, doesn't have a full-service station and decent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURIdzV2RHBRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hace una hora que estoy esperando para poder entrar y cargar nafta. Cuando llegue el camion de ypf a reponer nafta ya estaba. Un desastre y al finalizar de cargar los tanques de la estación, se ponen a limpiar los mostradores donde venden el aceite.. miemtras los otros dos empleados miran.. cansadaa

(Translated by Google)
I've been waiting an hour to get in and fill up with gas. When the YPF truck arrived to refill the tanks, it was already a mess. And after they finished filling the station's tanks, they started cleaning the counters where they sell oil... while the other two employees just watched... I'm so tired.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNIXzRmMDVBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de los playeros, y también al ser una estación oficial te aseguras la calidad de la nafta, mas arriba no hay estaciones oficiales, solo de bandera blanca. Es conveniente llenar el tanque ahí, así no cargar tanto en los otros lugares

(Translated by Google)
The attendants are excellent, and since it's an official station, you can be sure of the fuel quality. Further up the road there are no official stations, only independent ones. It's convenient to fill up there so you don't have to fill up so much at other places.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNIbjdDeVRnEAE
